description: A customer places a last-minute rush order and needs it to ship today.

nodes.task_description: Receive the rush order and flag it with high priority in the system.

expected_outcome.value: The order is created and marked as urgent.

nodes.task_description: Immediately generate a pick list and send it to the warehouse floor.

expected_outcome.value: The pick list is sent to a warehouse worker's handheld device.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for an expedited shipping service (e.g., overnight air) and generate the label.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects an overnight shipping option.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the order is picked, packed, and ready for the carrier pickup.

expected_outcome.value: The warehouse team prepares the order in time for the final pickup of the day.
